signals.headline: Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**
signals.raw:
Trump Extends Iran Ceasefire Indefinitely | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Trump's indefinite extension of the Iran ceasefire, confirmed on April 22, 2026, has removed the Hormuz geopolitical premium, driving Bitcoin to $77,541 (up 2.2%), Ethereum to $2,390 (up 0.7%), and XRP to $1.45 (up 1.5%) amid broader risk-on sentiment.[1]
matched_markets: Will Trump agree to Iranian enrichment of uranium in April?
Strait of Hormuz traffic returns to normal by end of April?

signals.headline: What is confirmed:** The Cleveland Cavaliers lead the Toronto Raptors 2-0 in their first-round Eastern Conference playof
signals.raw: What is confirmed:** The Cleveland Cavaliers lead the Toronto Raptors 2-0 in their first-round Eastern Conference playoff series[1][2]. In Game 2 on Monday night, the Cavaliers won 115-105 with dominant performances from Donovan Mitchell (30 points), James Harden (28 points), and Evan Mobley (25 points)[1]. Game 3 is scheduled for Thursday in Toronto[1].

signals.headline: Strategy Discloses $2
signals.raw:
Strategy Discloses $2.54B Bitcoin Purchase | YES | HIGH confidence**  
Strategy's $2.54 billion BTC buy, lifting holdings past 815,000 coins, absorbed three times April's global miner supply, forcing shorts to unwind above $76,000 and boosting Ethereum and XRP in the rally.[1]

signals.raw:
XRP ETF Inflows Surge with 6-Day Streak | YES | MED confidence**  
XRP leads altcoin rotation with sustained Wall Street inflows into XRP ETFs over six days, as institutions rotate past Bitcoin and Ethereum amid DeFi expansions (older catalysts like Rakuten listing noted earlier in April).[1][7]
